approvalSource: Steve approved unattended continuation after MODEL-ROUTING-001 shipped clean, with park-and-continue sprint rules and no stopping unless every safe task is blocked.
notes: Approved for bounded LLM router migration only: deep-audit senior-review workload routing, fail-closed Claude Code adapter contract, focused proof, local route truth, and dry-run route logging.
